variants.name: 霍利斯特舰长
variants.ability: 当你得知你死亡时，你要公开选择一名存活的玩家：如果他是邪恶的，当晚，与他邻近的一名存活善良玩家转变为邪恶。
variants.otherNightReminder: If a player has the 'Turns Evil' reminder token next to them. Select one of their good, living neighbours. Wake that player and show them the 'You Are' card, before giving them a thumbs-down. :reminder:
